query:
SELECT 
  cm.author,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ii.uuid) as totalItems
FROM catalog_masters cm
LEFT JOIN inventory_items ii ON cm.isbn13 = ii.isbn13
WHERE cm.author IS NOT NULL AND cm.author != ''
GROUP BY cm.author
ORDER BY totalItems DESC
LIMIT 5
